title: euonymus alatus subsp. sacrosanctus
intro: Euonymus alatus subsp. sacrosanctus, also known as the 'Sacred Euonymus', is a deciduous shrub native to East Asia, characterized by its distinctive winged branches and vibrant green leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Euonymus alatus subsp. sacrosanctus include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and acting as an antiseptic agent to prevent infection. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
